hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git commit'; then CHANGELOG_STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -c 'CHANGELOG.md'); if [ "$CHANGELOG_STAGED" = "0" ]; then CHANGELOG_MODIFIED=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -c 'CHANGELOG.md'); if [ "$CHANGELOG_MODIFIED" = "0" ]; then echo 'CHANGELOG.md has not been updated. Please add an entry to CHANGELOG.md under the [Unreleased] section before committing.'; exit 1; else echo 'WARNING: CHANGELOG.md has been modified but is not staged. Consider staging it with this commit.'; exit 0; fi; fi; fi; exit 0
